flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern Technical College fell 57% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 550).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 45% at Southern Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (532 vs 961).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southern Technical College fell 24% between 2023 and 2024 (75.7% → 57.6%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern Technical College rose 333% between 2019 and 2022 (7.7% → 33.3%).
